turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello, mujhe specifically Dr. Vineeta Gokhale se milna hai. Wo gynaecologist hain. Kya unka kal ka schedule pata kar sakte ho?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Main samajhti hoon aapki zaroorat. Lekin Dr. Gokhale ki specific daily schedule mere paas is system mein accessible nahin hai — main aapko galat timing batane ki galti nahin karna chahti.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Main aapko apni scheduling team se connect karti hoon — unke paas real-time calendar access hai aur woh seedha bata sakenge ki Dr. Gokhale kal available hain ya nahin, aur kab. Ek minute please.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Aapko scheduling desk se connect kar rahi hoon abhi. Shukriya aapke patience ka.
